response: The Customer Success team’s Q1 quarterly update details positive performance metrics (a 4-point NPS increase to 62, a 0.6% churn decrease to 1.2%, and 4.3/5 support CSAT), three top customer feature requests (SSO, custom dashboards, API rate limit increases), and an $800K pipeline of three potential enterprise expansions. Cross-functional stakeholders, including the product and sales teams, should review the prioritized feature requests and engage with the enterprise pipeline leads to advance the prospective $800K in revenue.
